chunks.title: Opening Invocation
chunks.reason: The psalmist calls on God to listen to his words and prayer.

chunks.title: God's Character Against Evil
chunks.reason: Describes God's nature regarding wickedness and liars.

chunks.title: Personal Trust and Petition
chunks.reason: The psalmist expresses confidence in entering God's house and asks for guidance.

chunks.title: Description of Foes
chunks.reason: Details the deceitful nature of enemies and calls for their judgment.

chunks.title: Promise to the Righteous
chunks.reason: Concludes with a blessing for those who take refuge in God.
